creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
> Then again, openjdk8 is obsolete now
According to Oracle[1], "extended support" for JDK8 will be offered until 2030. And "sustaining support" will be _indefinite_.

FreeBSD should be offering the version for a while...

[1] https://www.oracle.com/java/technologies/java-se-support-roadmap.html
